channel.title: Debugging on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Debugging on Pi Stack

item.title: Stern vs Kubetail vs Inspektor Gadget vs Kubectl-Trace: Best Kubernetes Debugging Tools 2026
item.description: When a Kubernetes pod crashes, returns 500 errors, or silently drops requests, the default kubectl logs command often isn’t enough. You need to tail logs across multiple pods simultaneously, trace network traffic between containers, or inspect system-level behavior with eBPF probes. This guide compares four open-source tools that fill those gaps: Stern, Kubetail, Inspektor Gadget, and kubectl-trace.
